# Support

## Getting Help

Use the following channels depending on your need:

- Bug reports: open an issue using the Bug Report template
- Feature ideas: open an issue using the Feature Request template
- Security concerns: follow [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for private reporting

If you are unsure where to start, open an issue and provide context, expected behavior, and environment details.

## Community and Project Support

- Check existing issues before opening a new one.
- Use clear reproduction steps for technical problems.
- Include logs, screenshots, and version details when relevant.

## Commercial Support by SOPTIM AG

SOPTIM AG provides professional services for organizations that need commercial support for RDFArchitect, including:

- Professional maintenance
- Integration services with existing systems
- Custom extensions and feature development
- Technical consulting and support

Contact:
